gatewayRequired: The OpenClaw Gateway needs to be running to use chat. It will start automatically, or you can start it from Settings.

offline.stoppedDesc: {{appName}} needs to connect to the OpenClaw Gateway before chat, role routing, and workflow execution can begin. You can start it now on port {{port}}.
offline.startingDesc: {{appName}} is starting and connecting to the OpenClaw Gateway. This usually takes a moment. Current port: {{port}}.
offline.errorDesc: {{appName}} ran into a problem while connecting to OpenClaw. You can restart the gateway now, or check the configuration in Settings.

welcome.title: {{appName}} Chat
welcome.subtitle: Hand off the work and I'll keep it moving
welcome.description: {{appName}} can handle complex tasks, drive multi-step execution, and coordinate multiple roles toward a finished result.
welcome.brainstormingDesc: Split and execute work across multiple roles
welcome.footerHint: Start by typing a goal, attaching materials, or choosing a target role from the toolbar.

composer.agentPickerTitle: Route the next message to another role
composer.modelSwitchFailed: Failed to switch model. Still using {{model}}: {{error}}
composer.disclaimer: AI can make mistakes. Please verify important information.

sessionErrors.noResponse: No response received from the model. The provider may be unavailable or the API key may have insufficient quota. Please check your provider settings.
sessionErrors.sendFailed: Failed to send message. Please check the provider or gateway status and try again.
sessionErrors.emptyAssistantResponse: The selected provider returned an empty response. Check the provider base URL, API protocol, model, and API key.

sessionErrorDetails.authInvalid: Authentication failed. Check API key or login status and try again.
sessionErrorDetails.timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.
sessionErrorDetails.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait and try again.
sessionErrorDetails.permission: Permission denied. Check your configuration and try again.
sessionErrorDetails.channelUnavailable: Service channel unavailable. Restart the app or gateway and try again.
sessionErrorDetails.network: Network error. Please verify connectivity and try again.
sessionErrorDetails.config: Configuration is invalid. Please review your settings and try again.
sessionErrorDetails.gatewayUnavailable: Gateway error. Please restart the gateway and try again.

sessionWarnings.finalReplyMissing: The final reply did not arrive, but you can continue the conversation.
sessionWarnings.assistantMissingInUI: A reply may exist in the session, but the current display settings cannot render it. Try Refresh in the toolbar, enable thinking/process details, or wait for the gateway to finish syncing.

archive.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to archive this session? You can review archived tasks later in Settings - Session Archive.
